name: National Initiative for Developing and Harnessing Innovations (NIDHI)
description: DST umbrella programme for scouting, supporting and scaling knowledge-based and technology-driven innovations into startups.
access_route: Use the linked NIDHI component programmes and approved centres.

name: National Science & Technology Entrepreneurship Development Board
description: DST entrepreneurship board supporting science, technology and innovation-based entrepreneurship and technology-intensive ventures.
access_route: Access support through NIDHI programmes, incubators and associated initiatives.

name: National Mission on Interdisciplinary Cyber-Physical Systems
description: Mission supporting translational research, technology development, startup incubation and commercialisation through Technology Innovation Hubs.
access_route: Startups should use the relevant Technology Innovation Hub's incubation, accelerator, challenge or funding opportunity.

name: NIDHI – Centres of Excellence
description: High-capacity entrepreneurship centres that strengthen regional innovation and startup support networks.
access_route: Use the programme-wise centre directory and individual centre opportunities.
